_comment: Connector-specific edits to GENERATED files that a cli-printing-press reprint must NOT clobber. check_handfixes.py asserts every marker below is still present (and banned anti-patterns absent) and fails CI if a reprint dropped one. status: active = connector-only, a reprint would clobber it; upstreamed = also fixed in the press, a reprint from a fixed press regenerates it, but the back-port must still be present today.

handfixes.summary: Better Stack updates are PATCH; monitors/heartbeats update + MCP update path call PatchWithParams, not PutWithParams
handfixes.why: Better Stack's Update endpoints are HTTP PATCH (partial update); a PUT 405s. Prior prints hand-fixed PUT->PATCH post-generate. The durable home is the spec (`method: PATCH`, which 4.22 emits natively as PatchWithParams), but the back-port must be present in the generated client + update commands today or every update fails.
handfixes.spec_encode_followup: Encode `method: PATCH` on the update operations in the press spec so PatchWithParams is emitted by construction (4.22+ supports this).

handfixes.summary: Live fan-out parsers decode IDs with json.Number + dec.UseNumber() so 7+ digit monitor IDs don't render in scientific notation
handfixes.why: Better Stack monitor/resource IDs are 7+ digits. An `any`->float64->%v decode renders them as 1.234e+06, silently breaking mirror joins (false 'monitor missing' + suppressed real drift). Only round-2 adversarial review caught it; the unit test masked it with a 5-digit ID. json.Number preserves the exact integer. Lives in the hand-authored statuspage-audit novel and the store decode path.

handfixes.summary: gen_governance keyword classifier mis-tiered incident verbs; hand-corrected: acknowledge/resolve/import -> Write, triage/workflow-archive -> Read
handfixes.why: gen_governance.py keyword-matches command paths and ignores pp:method, so for this incident/monitoring connector it BOTH false-negatived real writes (`incidents acknowledge`, `incidents resolve`, verb-less `import`) into Read AND false-positived read-only `triage` (a local incident board view) and `workflow archive` (local-only sync) into Write. The tiers were hand-corrected against the real method surface (12 routine writes). A full reprint re-runs gen_governance and would re-introduce the mis-tiering. See project_betterstack_onboard_gotchas, project_gen_governance_misses_verbless_writes.
handfixes.spec_encode_followup: Make gen_governance method-aware off agent-context pp:method (fleet-wide fix); until then this hand-correction recurs on every reprint.
